Our Services

Care that fits your life

Three focused services designed around continuity, honesty, and real access to your provider. All delivered via telehealth across Florida.

Primary Care

Ongoing care from a provider who knows you. Routine visits, medication management, and chronic condition care — all in one place.

Learn more

Weight Loss

Clinically supervised weight management. Personalized approach with GLP-1 evaluation, real provider oversight, and ongoing monitoring.

Learn more

TRT Evaluation

Lab-driven testosterone evaluation. Comprehensive symptom review and honest assessment — not a sales-driven TRT clinic.

Learn more
How It Works

Getting started is simple

From booking to your first visit — here's what to expect.

1

Book online

Schedule through our secure HIPAA-compliant patient portal. Same-week availability.

2

Complete your intake

Fill out a brief health history. Your provider reviews it before your visit so you spend time on care, not paperwork.

3

Meet your provider

Connect via telehealth and build a care plan together. Follow-ups, labs, and prescriptions managed through the portal.

Not sure which service is right for you?

Book a visit or send us a question. We'll help you figure out the right path.

Book a Visit Ask a Question

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance needed. Same-week appointments with a provider who knows you.
